title: FAMILY MENTAL HEALTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: JEANETTE'S PLACE FAMILY MENTAL HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe spaces where families can build healthy relationships by accessing behavioral health services such as individual and family psychotherapy, psychotherapy groups, and play therapy. 1787 State Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only (503) 566-2132 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 566-2132 Main phone Main phone (503) 566-2132 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Family Counseling Individual Counseling Parent Child Interactive Therapy If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JEANETTE'S PLACE
